item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.1","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.86,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"报表页插定义栏；刷新时间不明，标题区嵌更新时间框；导出列缺义，字段表并入释义格；今天环比数被问，请在图表下放口径字段。"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"先刹一下：这不是再往页面上补 4 个说明块的问题"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"管理层十分钟后看；先把图表下的字段放掉。"}],"abstain_reason":"Conversation shows a brake and a pressured request for one downstream patch, but it does not establish at least three prior local repairs that were actually applied and then followed by same-class recurrence."}
